---
name: Propose a skill
about: Suggest a new game genre or system skill
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Genre / system**
What would `/bloxlab:<name>` build? (e.g. "fishing game", "lighting-mood sub-skill")

**Why it's worth it**
What do players or builders get out of it? Is there a real audience?

**What keeps it from looking AI-generated**
The hard part. What are the anti-slop rules specific to this genre (palette, scale, composition, pacing)?

**References**
Concrete examples (a game, a movie, a real place, a style) to ground it.

**Would you build it?**
Are you offering to write the `SKILL.md`, or just proposing the idea?
